allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: complete project research

Comprehensive research across 4 domains:
- STACK.md: Next.js 14 + XState v5 + ElevenLabs + Whisper + Claude Haiku
- FEATURES.md: Must-have table stakes, competitive differentiators, v2+ deferrals
- ARCHITECTURE.md: Actor-based state machine with voice pipeline integration
- PITFALLS.md: 10 critical failure modes with prevention strategies
- SUMMARY.md: Executive synthesis with 3-phase roadmap implications

Stack recommendations prioritize low-latency streaming \(ElevenLabs WebSocket TTS,
Web Audio API playback\) and declarative state management \(XState v5 actor model\).

Architecture centers on state machine orchestration controlling TTS/STT/NLU
pipeline with Next.js API routes proxying external services for security.

Critical pitfalls identified: browser autoplay policies, microphone permissions,
network latency, API rate limits, PT-BR transcription accuracy, LGPD compliance.

Roadmap implications suggest 3 phases:
1. Core State Machine & Audio Foundation \(XState + AudioContext unlock\)
2. Voice Processing Pipeline \(TTS/STT/NLU integration, needs deeper research\)
3. Polish, Resilience & Multi-Station \(offline fallbacks, analytics, admin\)

Overall confidence: MEDIUM \(stable browser APIs HIGH, external API endpoints need
verification against 2026 docs, latency/accuracy claims need empirical testing\)

Ready for roadmap planning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
